SkittyDescription: A small pink kitten. It likes to gather soft things overnight.
FluffyTailDescription: A small toy in the shape of Skitty's tail. Use it to run away from danger.
ShinyClothDescription: A bolt of very sparkly cloth.
ShinyDollMakerDescription: Make your Dolls into their Shiny variants.
DollTradeBookDescription: Use it to trade your Dolls for placeable ones.

ShinyPokeDollDescription: Its shape looks familiar, but it has a different color than normal. Use it to run away from danger.
